# Ert

**Summary**: A near-surface geophysical method used to map spatial variations in subsurface resistivity to monitor moisture and salinity.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] used ERT to provide 2D imaging of a lab-scale sandbox model for monitoring MAR operations.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- ERT is an effective method for monitoring an aquifer recharge scheme, especially in aquifers prone to salinization. ([[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026, p. 18]])
